ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., tumor, normal) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the sample belongs to */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample is from */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the mutation belongs to */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of the mutation (e.g., clonal, subclonal) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation */,
  "cellularity" REAL /* Cellularity of the mutation */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the mutation occurs */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele */,
  "alternate_allele" TEXT /* Alternate allele */,
  "variant_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_mutation_type FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type") REFERENCES mutation_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the metric belongs to */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mu value of the mutation */,
  "clonal_mutations" REAL /* Number of clonal mutations */,
  "s" REAL /* S value of the mutation */,
  "t" REAL /* T value of the mutation */,
  "scmut" INTEGER /* Number of subclonal mutations */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the mutation */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the mutation data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the mutation metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_metrics_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_samples" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_comments_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
